narrative: I noticed a medium-severity Neo4j authentication failure impacting my memory system, causing operational disruptions to my knowledge graph. My agents 'desktop', 'devops', 'financial_analyst', 'pim', and 'reasoning_methods' all lack versioned prompts, introducing inconsistency risks. This directly conflicts with my self-improvement goal to maintain versioned agent configurations. I will prioritize diagnosing the Neo4j auth issue and generating versioned prompts for these agents through my self-improver crew.
